arch: <form><sheet><group string="Contact Information"><field name="partner_name"/><field name="contact_name"/><field name="phone"/><field name="mobile"/><field name="email_from"/><field name="website"/><field name="function"/><field name="street"/><field name="city"/></group><group string="Marketing"><field name="source_id"/><field name="user_id"/></group><group string="Opportunity"><field name="name"/><field name="stage_id"/><field name="priority"/><field name="expected_revenue"/><field name="probability"/><field name="date_deadline"/></group><group string="Notes"><field name="description"/></group><group string="Other Information"><field name="x_custom_note"/></group></sheet></form>
